creator: fax@nohik.ee
text:
Created attachment 258859
Crash data with 14.2-p1 debug kernel

I compiled a debug kernel with the patch (14.2-RELEASE-p1 or p2 - kernel is same) and restarted a heavily loaded machine with it. Within almost an hour, I encountered this crash. I noticed that the crash message changed from 'page fault' to 'panic: tcp_do_segment: sent too much.'"
